response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and DLang engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and significant large-scale distributed-systems/cloud-compute platform leadership. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and no demonstrated experience building internal cloud compute platforms or leading C++-centric infrastructure teams. Core minimum qualifications are not met.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Founder of an open-source platform deployed on Kubernetes, showing ownership and architecture exposure
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum required
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership track record
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
